Motivated by coarse geometry and the classical role of Roe algebras as large-scale invariants of proper metric spaces, we show that proper quantum metric spaces as introduced by Latre´molie`rearenoncommutativecoarsespaces. Thisfurtherallowsustodevelopabridgebetween Latre´molie`re’s framework and the W*-metric approach to quantum metric spaces. Furthermore, weconstructRoealgebrasforlocallycompactquantummetricspacesandverifythattheyrecover theclassicalRoealgebrasinthecommutativecase. Wefurthermoreapplythisframeworktosome examplesoflocallycompactquantummetricspacesandshowthatitleadstothenaturalconclusion.
